From our partner, Cautious Optimism

Stop Coding. Start Vibing.

"Vibe Coding" isn't just about writing prompts. It's about evolving from a manual coder to a technical conductor. This roadmap outlines:

  • How to use tools like Cursor, Windsurf, and Claude 3.5 to move beyond autocomplete and toward full-codebase composition.
  • How to master the "Describe → Draft → Review" loop, where debugging happens through high-level feedback instead of line-by-line fixing.
  • Why understanding system design, Git version control, and Unix fundamentals still matters.
  • How to refactor, structure, and document AI-generated projects so they scale and remain maintainable.
Explore the Roadmap

Stop Coding. Start Vibing.

"Vibe Coding" isn't just about writing prompts. It's about evolving from a manual coder to a technical conductor. This roadmap outlines:

- How to use tools like Cursor, Windsurf, and Claude 3.5 to move beyond autocomplete and toward full-codebase composition.
- How to master the "Describe → Draft → Review" loop, where debugging happens through high-level feedback instead of line-by-line fixing.
- Why understanding system design, Git version control, and Unix fundamentals still matters.
- How to refactor, structure, and document AI-generated projects so they scale and remain maintainable.
